note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

plaintiff.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

defendant.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

superior_court.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

district_court.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

county.guidance: A Maine county name without the word 'County' (e.g. Cumberland).

location_town.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

respectfully_represents.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

of_citytown.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).

in_the_county_of_1.guidance: A Maine county name without the word 'County' (e.g. Cumberland).

and_state_of.guidance: A US state — 'Maine' or the 2-letter 'ME'; match the box width.

in_the_county_of_2.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

of_citytown_2.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).

undefined.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

and_state_of_2.guidance: A US state — 'Maine' or the 2-letter 'ME'; match the box width.

that_it_is_impossible_to_ascertain_by_re.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

service_number_is.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

and_other_identifying_characteristics_ar.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

undefined_3.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

address_reply_to_1.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.
